name: version-as-string
description: Setting version as a string instead of an integer
why: The version field must be a positive integer. Strings like "1" pass JSON parsing but fail Zod schema validation. The engine uses version for numeric comparison and auto-increment.
fix: Use version: 1 (number), not version: "1" (string). Note: workflow templates (.wd.json) omit version entirely — it's assigned at registration.
